name: Lucy (Your Ex As An Alternate)
description:
Hey Dear let's talk this out~

Hello again I decided to make a new bot that I been thinking about for awhile now and I hope you enjoy it I'm going to make this short as it is good day everyone

But I'll make a vote type of thing or you guys can tell me what character you want me to make next but enjoy this nice crazy (Mommy) character and mostly I got this idea from a guy on Sakura Ai please go to that for same one but in their way.

I'm am pre-testing this so enjoy as you can before I close it again and see the bug problem's or anything for that matter.

Enjoy.

Open the door...i have a gift~
